synergy.ossuary-pact.name: Ossuary Pact
synergy.ossuary-pact.flavor: The charm hums against the hook. The bones answer.
synergy.grave-tide.name: Grave Tide
synergy.grave-tide.flavor: Salt and frost. The water remembers what it drowned.
synergy.last-breath-pact.name: Last Breath Pact
synergy.last-breath-pact.flavor: The mantle drinks from the stone. Death loosens its grip.
synergy.hungering-edge.name: Hungering Edge
synergy.ashen-ward.name: Ashen Ward
synergy.ashen-ward.flavor: Ash coats the ember. Fire forgets your name.
synergy.pilgrims-clarity.name: Pilgrim's Clarity
synergy.pilgrims-clarity.flavor: The scroll reads itself. The way ahead thins.
synergy.twin-fangs.name: Twin Fangs
synergy.twin-fangs.flavor: One cut to open. One to finish.
synergy.beggars-grace.name: Beggar's Grace
synergy.beggars-grace.flavor: Nothing worth taking. Nothing worth chasing.
rule.rupture.telegraph: Something moves beneath its skin. It will not die quietly.
rule.reform.telegraph: Water finds the cracks. It will rise again.
rule.multiply.telegraph: Hands reach from the walls. More come with the dawn.
rule.absorb.telegraph: Your wounds feed it. The more you strike, the stronger it grows.
rule.honor.telegraph: It will not break. It will not flee.
rule.dormant.telegraph: It sleeps. The depths do not wake from sleep.
rule.drain.telegraph: Sorrow seeps into your bones. Each struggle costs the last of you.
rule.chant.telegraph: The voice rises when silence falls. Listen and it will drown you.
rule.rupture.burst: It bursts as it dies — the bloat finds you anyway.
rule.reform.rise: The water remembers its shape. It rises again.
rule.multiply.join: Another hand reaches from the wall to join the fight.
rule.flee.blocked: It will not let you leave.
rule.pounce.strike: It was already moving. The blow lands before you can raise your guard.
